objective: Add mostConnectedNode() pure helper to graph.ts and extend carto stats CLI to show most connected node title and degree
key_changes: mostConnectedNode(graph) returns { node: Node | null, degree: number } in src/store/graph.ts
Count both incoming and outgoing edges bidirectionally for degree calculation
Return { node: null, degree: 0 } sentinel when no edges exist
carto stats CLI extended to print most connected node or (no edges)
4 vitest tests: no-edges sentinel, bidirectional degree, first-encountered tie-break, empty graph
